root:
# NapCat Directory

This directory exposes NapCat QQ bot capabilities as files through `skills-fs` (FUSE virtual filesystem). Subdirectories and files represent API endpoints, events, alerts, conversations, and group/friend management operations.

## Directory Tree

```
/napcat/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AGENTS.md                          вЂ” this file
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ SKILL.md                           вЂ” skill documentation
в”‚
в”‚  Legacy root API files (all remain for backward compatibility):
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ send_group                         вЂ” send group message (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ send_private                       вЂ” send private message (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ delete                             вЂ” delete a message (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ clear_alert                        вЂ” clear one alert (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ clear_all_alerts                   вЂ” clear all alerts (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ group_kick                         вЂ” kick group member (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ group_ban                          вЂ” ban group member (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ group_admin                        вЂ” set/unset admin (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ group_card                         вЂ” set group card (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ group_name                         вЂ” set group name (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ group_leave                        вЂ” leave group (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ friend_add                         вЂ” add friend (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ friend_remark                      вЂ” set friend remark (write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ get_image                          вЂ” get image data (read or write JSON)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ get_file                           вЂ” get file data
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ get_qr                             вЂ” get QR code
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ status                             вЂ” bot status (read-only)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ events                             вЂ” recent events (read-only)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ alerts                             вЂ” pending alerts (read-only)
в”‚
в”‚  Per-group operations:
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ groups/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ :group_id/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ kick                       вЂ” kick member (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ban                        вЂ” ban member (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ admin                      вЂ” set/unset admin (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ card                       вЂ” set card (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ name                       вЂ” set group name (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ leave                      вЂ” leave group (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ info                       вЂ” get group info (read-only)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ members                    вЂ” list members (read-only)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ essence_list               вЂ” list essence msgs (read-only)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ poke                       вЂ” send poke (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ honor                      вЂ” get honor list (read-only)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ announce                   вЂ” send notice (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ send                       вЂ” send group message (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AGENTS.md                  вЂ” group operations guide
в”‚       в”‚
в”‚       в”‚  Time-range message directories:
в”‚       в”‚
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ recent/                    вЂ” recent messages
в”‚       в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ :message_id/
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ metadata           вЂ” sender, time, type (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ text               вЂ” concatenated text content (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ image              вЂ” first image url/metadata (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ image_2            вЂ” second image (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ file               вЂ” first file info (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ video              вЂ” video info (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ record             вЂ” voice record info (read-only)
в”‚       в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ forward            вЂ” forward message info (read-only)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 1days/                     вЂ” messages from last 1 day
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 7days/                     вЂ” messages from last 7 days
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 30days/                    вЂ” messages from last 30 days
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ 90days/                    вЂ” messages from last 90 days
в”‚
в”‚  Per-friend operations:
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ friends/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ :user_id/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ info                       вЂ” get stranger info (read-only)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ remark                     вЂ” set friend remark (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ send                       вЂ” send private message (write JSON)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AGENTS.md                  вЂ” friend operations guide
в”‚       в”‚
в”‚       в”‚  Time-range message directories (same structure as groups):
в”‚       в”‚
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ recent/                    вЂ” recent private messages
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 1days/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 7days/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 30days/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ 90days/
```

## Path Parameters

Paths with `:` prefixed segments are dynamic. The agent fills in real values:

| Parameter | Description | Example |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| `:group_id` | QQ group number | `groups/123456/send` |
| `:user_id` | QQ user number | `friends/111222/send` |
| `:time_range` | Time window: `recent`, `1days`, `7days`, `30days`, `90days` | `groups/123456/recent/` |
| `:message_id` | Numeric message ID returned by `list_messages` | `groups/123456/recent/100/metadata` |
| `:content` | Content selector: `metadata`, `text`, `image`, `image_2`, `file`, `video`, `record`, `forward` | `groups/123456/recent/100/image` |

## Working with Write Files

All write-enabled files follow a 3-step pattern:

### Step 1 вЂ” Read the `.schema` file

Every write file has a companion `NAME.schema` file showing the expected JSON format:

```bash
cat groups/123456/ban.schema
# Output: {"params": ["user_id", "ban", "duration"], "required": ["user_id"], ...}
```

### Step 2 вЂ” Write valid JSON

Write a JSON object matching the schema to the action file:

```bash
echo '{"user_id": 999, "duration": 60}' > groups/123456/ban
```

### Step 3 вЂ” Read back the result

Read the file back to see the operation result. With writeback enabled, successful writes store the provider response; failed writes (invalid JSON, server error) return an error object with `expected_schema` hint:

```bash
cat groups/123456/ban
# Success:  {"status": "ok", ...}
# Error:    {"error": "invalid JSON", "expected_schema": {"params": ["user_id", "ban", "duration"], ...}, "hint": "write valid JSON; see .../ban.schema"}
```

## Examples

### Send a group message

```bash
echo '{"message": [{"type": "text", "data": {"text": "hello"}}]}' > groups/123456/send
cat groups/123456/send
# -> {"status": "ok", "message_id": 42}
```

### Check a message's image

```bash
cat groups/123456/recent/100/image
# -> {"url": "https://...", "file": "...", "file_size": 12345, "summary": "..."}
```

### Ban a user in a group

```bash
echo '{"user_id": 999, "duration": 60}' > groups/123456/ban
cat groups/123456/ban
# -> {"status": "ok"}
```

### See what happens with bad JSON

```bash
echo 'not json' > groups/123456/ban
cat groups/123456/ban
# -> {"error": "invalid JSON", "expected_schema": {"params": ["user_id", "ban", "duration"], ...}}
```

### Read message metadata

```bash
cat groups/123456/recent/100/metadata
# -> {"message_id": 100, "sender": {"user_id": 111, "nickname": "..."}, "time": 1234567890, ...}
```

## Read-Only Files

Files with mode `0444` are read-only. Simply read them:

```bash
cat events            # Recent events (default: 2 most recent, use ?limit=N for more)
cat alerts            # Pending alerts
cat status            # Bot online status
cat groups/123456/info         # Group info
cat groups/123456/members      # Member list
cat friends/111222/info        # Friend/stranger info
```

## Per-Message Content Directories

When a message contains multiple segments (text, images, files, etc.), the per-message directory exposes each as a separate file. See the per-message content guide below.

```bash
# List available content files for a message
ls groups/123456/recent/100/
# -> metadata  text  image  file

# Read the text content
cat groups/123456/recent/100/text
# -> "This is the concatenated text from all text segments"
```

## Pitfalls

- **Bot must be online**: Check `cat status` before issuing write actions. If the bot is offline, start it with `napcat daemon start`.
- **Rate limits**: `send_like` / poke is rate-limited by QQ. Error 1400 means rate limit hit. Wait 30+ seconds between actions on the same user.
- **Message recall window**: Recall own messages within 2 minutes; others' messages within 20 seconds.
- **File/image paths**: For local files, prefix with `file:///` (e.g., `file:///tmp/image.png`). URLs (`http://`) and base64 (`base64://`) are also accepted.
- **Non-JSON writes fail**: Write files expect valid JSON. Bad input returns an error with schema hint on readback.
- **Events limit**: The `events` file returns only the 2 most recent events by default. Use `?limit=N` to get more.
groups:
# Groups Directory

This directory lists all QQ group IDs the bot has interacted with. Each group ID becomes a dynamic directory containing operations and time-range message directories.

## Directory Structure

```
groups/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ :group_id/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ kick, ban, admin, card, name, leave   вЂ” management operations (write)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ info, members, essence_list, honor    вЂ” read-only queries
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ poke, announce, send                  вЂ” write operations
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AGENTS.md                             вЂ” this file
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ recent/                               вЂ” recent messages
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 1days/, 7days/, 30days/, 90days/     вЂ” older messages
```

## Group Operations Reference

Each operation file has a companion `.schema` file documenting expected JSON parameters.

| File | Provider Action | Mode | Required Params | Description |
|------|----------------|------|-----------------|-------------|
| `kick` | `set_group_kick` | write | `user_id` | Kick a member from the group. Optional `ban` (bool) to also ban. |
| `ban` | `set_group_ban` | write | `user_id` | Ban or unban a member. `ban: true` + `duration` (seconds) to ban; `ban: false` to unban. |
| `admin` | `set_group_admin` | write | `user_id` | Set (`enable: true`) or remove (`enable: false`) group admin. |
| `card` | `set_group_card` | write | `user_id`, `card` | Set a user's display name (card) in the group. |
| `name` | `set_group_name` | write | `name` | Change the group's name. |
| `leave` | `group_leave` | write | *(none)* | Bot leaves this group. Write empty JSON `{}`. |
| `info` | `get_group_info` | read-only | *(none)* | Get group details: name, member count, creation date. |
| `members` | `get_group_member_list` | read-only | *(none)* | List all group members with roles and cards. |
| `essence_list` | `get_essence_list` | read-only | *(none)* | Get group essence (pinned) messages. |
| `poke` | `send_poke` | write | `user_id` | Send a QQ poke/nudge to a member. Rate-limited. |
| `honor` | `get_group_honor_list` | read-only | *(none)* | Get group honor/achievement list. |
| `announce` | `send_group_notice` | write | `content` | Post a group notice/announcement. Optional `hint`. |
| `send` | `send_group_message` | write | `message` | Send a message to the group. See message format below. |

## Message Format

The `message` field is an array of segments. Each segment has `type` and `data`:

| Type | Data Fields | Description |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| `text` | `text` | Plain text |
| `image` | `url`, `file`, `file_size`, `summary` | Image (use `url` for remote, `file:///path` for local) |
| `at` | `qq` | @mention a user by QQ ID |
| `face` | `id` | QQ emoji/face |
| `reply` | `id` | Reply to a message by ID |
| `record` | `url` | Voice record |
| `video` | `file`, `name` | Video file |

Example:
```json
{"message": [{"type": "text", "data": {"text": "hello @everyone"}}, {"type": "at", "data": {"qq": 123456}}]}
```

## Per-Message Content

Under `groups/:group_id/:time_range/:message_id/`, each message is exposed as content files:

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| `metadata` | Message metadata: `message_id`, `sender` (user_id, nickname), `time`, `group_id`, `message_type`. **Always present.** |
| `text` | All text segments concatenated. **Always present** (empty string if no text). |
| `image` | First image segment: `url`, `file`, `file_size`, `summary`. Present if message contains image(s). |
| `image_2` / `image_3` | Second / third image segment. Named per occurrence. |
| `file` | First file segment info. Present if message contains file attachments. |
| `file_2` | Second file segment. |
| `video` | Video segment info: `url`. Present if message contains video. |
| `record` | Voice record segment info: `url`. Present if message contains a voice record. |
| `forward` | Forward message node info: `id`. Present for forwarded multi-message nodes. |

### Accessing per-message content

```bash
# List what content is available for a message
ls groups/123456/recent/100/

# Read the text
cat groups/123456/recent/100/text

# Get image URL
cat groups/123456/recent/100/image

# Check sender and timestamp
cat groups/123456/recent/100/metadata
```
groups_per_group:
# Group Directory

Parameters:
- group_id: QQ group ID

## Operations

| File | Mode | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `kick` | write | Kick member. Read `kick.schema` for format. |
| `ban` | write | Ban member. Read `ban.schema`. |
| `admin` | write | Set/unset admin. Read `admin.schema`. |
| `card` | write | Set group card (display name). Read `card.schema`. |
| `name` | write | Change group name. Read `name.schema`. |
| `leave` | write | Bot leaves group. Write `{}`. |
| `info` | read | Group info: name, member count. |
| `members` | read | List all members. |
| `essence_list` | read | Pinned (essence) messages. |
| `poke` | write | Send poke/nudge. Rate-limited. |
| `honor` | read | Group honor/achievement list. |
| `announce` | write | Post group notice. |
| `send` | write | Send group message. Read `send.schema`. |

## Working Pattern

1. Read `NAME.schema` to see expected JSON format.
2. Write valid JSON to `NAME` file.
3. Read `NAME` back to see result (or error with schema hint).

Example: `echo '{"user_id": 999, "duration": 60}' > ban`

## Subdirectories

Time ranges: `recent`, `1days`, `7days`, `30days`, `90days`.
Each contains message ID directories with content files (metadata, text, image, etc.).
time_range:
# Time Range Directory

Parameters:
- group_id: QQ group ID
- time_range: recent | 1days | 7days | 30days | 90days

Lists message IDs in the selected time range.
Each message ID is a directory containing content files:

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| `metadata` | Sender, time, message type. Always present. |
| `text` | Concatenated text. Always present. |
| `image` / `image_2` | Image segments. One per image. |
| `file` / `file_2` | File attachments. |
| `video` | Video info. |
| `record` | Voice record info. |
| `forward` | Forwarded message node info. |

Example: `cat groups/123456/recent/100/metadata`
friends:
# Friends Directory

This directory lists all QQ user IDs the bot has exchanged private messages with. Each user ID becomes a dynamic directory containing operations and time-range message directories.

## Directory Structure

```
friends/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ :user_id/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ info                            вЂ” get user info (read-only)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ remark                          вЂ” set friend remark (write)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ send                            вЂ” send private message (write)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AGENTS.md                       вЂ” this file
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ recent/                         вЂ” recent messages
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 1days/, 7days/, 30days/, 90days/ вЂ” older messages
```

## Friend Operations Reference

| File | Provider Action | Mode | Required Params | Description |
|------|----------------|------|-----------------|-------------|
| `info` | `get_stranger_info` | read-only | *(none)* | Get user profile info: nickname, age, gender. |
| `remark` | `set_friend_remark` | write | `user_id`, `remark` | Set a display name (remark) for this friend. |
| `send` | `send_private_message` | write | `user_id`, `message` | Send a private message. Message format same as group messages. |

### Send a private message

```bash
echo '{"user_id": 111222, "message": [{"type": "text", "data": {"text": "hello"}}]}' > friends/111222/send
cat friends/111222/send
# -> {"status": "ok", "message_id": 42}
```

### Set a friend remark

```bash
echo '{"user_id": 111222, "remark": "Alice"}' > friends/111222/remark
```

### Get user info

```bash
cat friends/111222/info
# -> {"user_id": 111222, "nickname": "Alice", "age": 25, "sex": "F"}
```

## Per-Message Content

The per-message content directory structure under `friends/:user_id/:time_range/:message_id/` mirrors the group structure:

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| `metadata` | Message metadata: `message_id`, `sender` (user_id, nickname), `time`, `user_id`, `message_type`. **Always present.** |
| `text` | All text segments concatenated. **Always present** (empty string if no text). |
| `image` / `image_2` / ... | Image segments. One file per image in the message. |
| `file` / `file_2` | File attachment segments. |
| `video` | Video segment info. |
| `record` | Voice record segment info. |
| `forward` | Forward message node info. |

```bash
# Read friend's message text
cat friends/111222/recent/200/text

# Check who sent it and when
cat friends/111222/recent/200/metadata
```
friends_per_user:
# Friend Directory

Parameters:
- user_id: QQ user ID

## Operations

| File | Mode | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `info` | read | User profile: nickname, age, gender. |
| `remark` | write | Set display name. Read `remark.schema`. |
| `send` | write | Send private message. Read `send.schema`. |

## Working Pattern

1. Read `NAME.schema` to see expected JSON format.
2. Write valid JSON to `NAME` file.
3. Read `NAME` back to see result (or error with schema hint).

Example: `echo '{"message": [{"type": "text", "data": {"text": "hello"}}]}' > send`

## Subdirectories

Time ranges: `recent`, `1days`, `7days`, `30days`, `90days`.
Each contains message ID directories with content files (metadata, text, image, etc.).

# Time Range Directory

Parameters:

- time_range: recent | 1days | 7days | 30days | 90days

Each message ID directory contains content files:

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| `metadata` | Sender, time, message type. Always present. |
| `text` | Concatenated text. Always present. |
| `image` / `image_2` | Image segments. One per image. |
| `file` / `file_2` | File attachments. |
| `video` | Video info. |
| `record` | Voice record info. |
| `forward` | Forwarded message node info. |

Example: `cat friends/111222/recent/200/text`
per_message_content:
# Per-Message Content

Each individual message is exposed as a directory of content files, one per segment type found in the message.

## Content Selectors

| Selector | When Present | Content |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `metadata` | **Always** | `message_id`, `sender` (user_id, nickname), `time`, `group_id` or `user_id`, `message_type` |
| `text` | **Always** | Concatenated text from all `text` segments. Empty string if no text. |
| `image` | If message has image segment(s) | `url`, `file`, `file_size`, `summary` for the first image |
| `image_2` | If message has 2+ images | Same fields for the second image |
| `image_N` | Additional images | One file per additional image (`image_3`, etc.) |
| `file` | If message has file attachment(s) | File metadata |
| `file_2` | Second file attachment | File metadata |
| `video` | If message has a video | `url` of the video |
| `record` | If message has a voice record | `url` of the record |
| `forward` | If message is a forwarded node | `id` of the forwarded message node |

## Accessing Content

```bash
# List available content files
ls groups/123456/recent/100/
# -> metadata  text  image  file

# Read specific content
cat groups/123456/recent/100/metadata   # sender, time, type
cat groups/123456/recent/100/text       # message text
cat groups/123456/recent/100/image      # image URL and metadata
```

The same structure applies under `friends/:user_id/:time_range/:message_id/`.
